note_on_premise: The old 'zero live files import intelligence; flags do nothing' status is STALE — wiring (PRs #311/#312/#313 + 5 Hindsight commits) is merged. 5 non-test files import the library; flags resolve through env->settings->default; several modules have verified behavioral forks. But every behavior-changing flag is default OFF with NO renderer UI to enable it, so the shipped default build is effectively inert.

category_pass.C_wta: 15/15 (decision layer only; LLM generation NOT executable headless)

honest_gaps: WTA LLM generation degrades to a clarification stall under the node:sqlite harness shim (needs sqlite-vec/vec0). The existing benchmark:wta hides this; this suite catches it.
Hindsight live recall = NOOP (no server on :8888). Safe-fallback contract verified; live recall not.
E/F/G/I/J/K verified at compiled-service level from dist-electron, not via a live renderer (several have no renderer caller).
No GUI in environment — representative prompts driven through the same real harness path the app uses.

high: H1: OutputShapeNormalizer.compressToSpeakable destroys fenced code/Mermaid (flag-gated off; fix-before-enable). Empirically reproduced by lead.
H2: uncommitted LLMHelper.ts removes tail-latency hedging (NOT Hindsight; verified 0 hindsight refs) — always-on, reverses documented benchmark fix; split into separate release.
medium: M1: IntelligenceMetrics dead code (0 non-test importers, lead-confirmed)
M2: 5 preload IPCs with 0 src callers (lecture/diagram/in-meeting-search/flag-get/flag-set) — no UI to toggle flags
M3: Hindsight recall race timer not cleared on win path
